articles.title: Hundreds of flights delayed or cancelled at Logan Airport
articles.description:
Airlines are allowing itinerary changes.

The post Hundreds of flights delayed or cancelled at Logan Airport appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hundreds of flights were delayed or cancelled at Logan Airport on March 16.
Airlines are permitting itinerary changes for affected passengers.
Boston residents may face travel disruptions and longer wait times.

articles.title: 11 charged after allegedly staging robberies to claim victim status on immigration applications
articles.description:
Officials say Mass. convenience store clerks posed as armed robbery victims to support their U Visa applications.

The post 11 charged after allegedly staging robberies to claim victim status on immigration applications appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Eleven Massachusetts convenience store clerks staged robberies to support U Visa applications.
Charges include conspiracy and false reporting, impacting local law enforcement resources.
The case raises concerns about immigration fraud in Boston's immigrant communities.
